name: Asana
description: Create, read, update, and manage tasks in Asana
author: awaitstep

projectId.label: Project ID
projectId.description: Asana project GID. Used by: Create Task, List Tasks.

taskId.label: Task ID
taskId.description: Asana task GID. Used by: Get Task, Update Task, Add Comment.

name.label: Name
name.description: Task name. Used by: Create Task, Update Task.

notes.label: Notes
notes.description: Task notes/description. Used by: Create Task, Update Task.

assignee.label: Assignee
assignee.description: Assignee user GID or email. Used by: Create Task, Update Task.

dueOn.label: Due Date
dueOn.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Used by: Create Task, Update Task.

commentText.label: Comment Text
commentText.description: Comment body text. Used by: Add Comment.
